description.overview: One of Japan's oldest breeds, the Hokkaido is a brave, devoted hunting dog capable of working in harsh winter conditions. They're loyal family companions.
description.temperament: Known for being faithful, brave, dignified.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their dense double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: One of Japan's oldest breeds, the Hokkaido is a brave, devoted hunting dog capable of working in harsh winter conditions. They're loyal family companions.
